channel.title: Laravel on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Laravel on Arrans github.io

item.title: monicahq/monica
item.description: Personal CRM. Remember everything about your friends, family and business relationships.

item.title: shadcn-ui/ui
item.description: A set of beautifully-designed, accessible components and a code distribution platform. Works with your favorite frameworks. Open Source. Open Code.

item.title: BookStackApp/BookStack
item.description: A platform to create documentation/wiki content built with PHP & Laravel

item.title: coollabsio/coolify
item.description: An open-source, self-hostable PaaS alternative to Vercel, Heroku & Netlify that lets you easily deploy static sites, databases, full-stack applications and 280+ one-click services on your own servers.

item.title: David-Crty/databasement
item.description: Self-hosted database backup manager with a web UI. Schedule, backup, and restore MySQL, PostgreSQL, MariaDB, MongoDB, SQLite & Redis to S3, SFTP, or local storage. SSH Tunnel support.

item.title: goforj/godump
item.description: A minimal, developer-friendly pretty-printer and debug dumper for Go structs, inspired by Laravel’s dump() and Symfony’s VarDumper.
